name: docmind
description: MCP server that exposes DocMind's RAG-powered document Q&A as tools. Ingest PDFs or text files and ask questions grounded in their content.

tools.name: ingest_document
tools.description: Use this tool to add a PDF or text document to the knowledge base. Call this before querying.

tools.name: query_documents
tools.description: Use this tool to answer a question using documents in the knowledge base. Returns the answer and source chunks.
